records.ety: [L. infantia: cf. F. enfance. See Infant.]

defs: The state or period of being an infant; the first part of life; early childhood.
quotes: The babe yet lies in smiling infancy.
Their love in early infancy began.

defs: The first age of anything; the beginning or early period of existence; as, the infancy of an art.
quotes: The infancy and the grandeur of Rome.

defs: The state or condition of one under age, or under the age of twenty-one years; nonage; minority.
